occupation: Head of Development at Tractor Outdoor
headline: Head of Development | Tractor Outdoor
summary:
(D)OOH Media Development & Strategic Partnerships

Development specialist with nearly two decades of experience in the out-of-home (OOH) media sector, focused on building and scaling high-value (D)OOH portfolios through strategic site development, complex deal structuring, and long-term partnerships.
 
My expertise lies in identifying and unlocking premium opportunities across both public and private sector environments, while navigating regulatory frameworks and municipal processes to deliver compliant, commercially viable assets. I operate at the intersection of property, infrastructure, and media, working closely with developers, institutional landlords, and government stakeholders to bring (D)OOH signage projects to market.
 
At Tractor Outdoor, I have played a key role in expanding the portfolio and strengthening the company’s market position across the Western Cape, establishing one of the largest DOOH roadside digital (RSD) networks in the region. This includes contributing to the securing of exclusive advertising rights for the V&A Waterfront, one of the region’s most prestigious commercial and tourism hubs.
 
I bring a strong commercial focus to every project, with a proven ability to structure and negotiate agreements that balance risk, return, and long-term sustainability. My approach combines strategic thinking with hands-on execution, ensuring that opportunities are not only identified, but successfully delivered.
 
Key Areas of Expertise:
 
 (D)OOH Portfolio Strategy & Expansion 
 Complex Deal Structuring & Negotiation 
 Public & Private Sector Partnerships 
 Regulatory Navigation & Compliance (Municipal & Environmental) 
 Property & Infrastructure-Led Media Development 
 Tender Processes & Large-Scale Project Delivery 
 Revenue Optimization & Commercial Strategy
location_str: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Head of Development
experiences.location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: National Business Development Manager
experiences.description:
Identify, Develop and Maintain (D)Ooh advertising portfolio of Tractor Outdoor, Negotiate commercial business terms and build business relationships between Tractor and partnering companies. Manage landlords, clients and property portfolio's. Draft proposals, leases, applications and various legal motivations for City council departments .

Duties and responsibilities

-	Identifying potential (D)Ooh advertising sites
-       Draft legal reports and motivations (Appeals, Space Reductions, Designations, Building plans)
-	Negotiating and securing of new outdoor sites and all relevant media space - All Ooh format sites
-	Negotiating with Councils/Municipalities for tenders and advertising rights
-	Negotiating and renewing existing rights at profitable standards to ensure best profits
-	Compiling of tender documents and proposals
-	Preparing and submitting of Applications for potential sites
-	Managing all landlords on a monthly basis
-	Maintaining Client Relations
-	Preparing and sending out of Monthly Management Reports
-	Capturing and running of all secured advertising contracts
-	Monthly billing reports
-      Negotiating and renewing existing rights at profitable standards to ensure best profits
-      Managing of development team

experiences.title: General Manager
experiences.description:
Manage the business relationship between Innovocean and The V&A Waterfront to ensure best practices and to meet company objectives in accordance with the business needs. Specialist within in mall advertising environment.

Duties and responsibilities
-  Compile and submission of Innovocean winning tender 
-  Identifying potential advertising sites (Digital, Static, Ambient)
-  Manage Innovocean team (Production & Marketing) 
-  Manage Sub Contractors on site
-  Have all City Approvals in place for new Signage (Masterplan, designations, applications)
experiences.location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: (MOST Awards) - Media Owner Overall Lamb Award
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: The MOST Awards is to the media industry what the Loerie Awards is to creative agencies. Running for its 5th year, the MOST Awards, awards media owners and agencies alike on different key criteria totally focused on relations and service delivery in the industry. http://www.bizcommunity.com/Article/196/40/99557.html

accomplishment_projects.title: Four new Roadside Digitals for Cape Town N2
New digital billboards for Tractor Outdoor
#ClashWall
accomplishment_projects.description: What do you get when you combine a graffiti artist, a canvas and social media? @Converse_Africa in collaboration with Tractor Outdoor have implemented South Africa's first live graffiti exhibition with creative suggestions being spurred on via the #clashwall #CT Twitter hashtags. The event, located at the famous yellow Clock Tower at the V&A Waterfront ran from the 28th February till the 3rd March 2014. A local street artist was on hand bridging the gap between outdoor and social media by creating the concepts that were suggested by inspired twitter fans. People were then encouraged to snap pictures and share them amongst social media platforms. The project was an immense success with many locals coming out to see the concept as it came alive from a drab canvas to an inspiring piece of artwork.
